seed_instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities.
org_constraint: Format your response into a bulleted list with exactly four points, each containing at least 30 words.
new_constraint: The response must contain no more than 100 words.
instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities. Format your response into a bulleted list with exactly four points, each containing at least 30 words. The response must contain no more than 100 words.
response:
As an AI, I don't actually have a gym, so I can't share personal opinions on facilities! However, I can provide a sample response based on a hypothetical high-quality gym:

* The weight room boasts an extensive collection of modern, well-maintained equipment, ensuring diverse training possibilities for every fitness level.
* Classrooms are spacious and brightly lit, offering a motivating and comfortable environment for various group fitness sessions and yoga.
* Restroom facilities are impeccably clean and stocked, reflecting a genuine commitment to member hygiene and overall comfort.
* The cardio area features the latest generation of treadmills and ellipticals, providing smooth, high-performance workouts for peak endurance.<turn|>
